final:
module sync_johnson_counter(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [7:0] q
    );

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 8'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= {q[6:0], ~q[7]};
        end
    end
endmodule
